tools.name: celebrate_kaomoji
tools.description: Return a CLI-safe celebration kaomoji for completed tasks, solved problems, or milestone moments.

tools.name: thinking_kaomoji
tools.description: Return a random CLI-safe thinking kaomoji for each sub-task or thinking phase, creating a visible thinking progress indicator. Supports optional mcp_server parameter to indicate which MCP server is being delegated to.

tools.name: apologize_kaomoji
tools.description: Return a CLI-safe apology kaomoji when no results are found, errors occur, or the user is dissatisfied.
